assertions.title: Plan auto-saves to Supabase

steps.observed: Plan creation page loaded successfully

steps.action: Submit chat message: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'
steps.expected: AI generates plan and auto-saves to database
steps.observed: AI generated plan successfully with semester grid
No visible error, but plan not persisted

steps.expected: Newly created plan appears in listing
steps.observed: Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' - plan was not saved

evidence.network: No API requests captured for plan persistence - network monitoring may not be capturing internal fetch calls

assertions.issues: CRITICAL: Plan is generated by AI but never persisted to the database. Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' after plan generation. The auto-save functionality is not working.

assertions.title: Load existing plan by ID

steps.action: Attempt to navigate to /plan/[id] with valid plan ID
steps.expected: Full plan loads with semester grid and chat history
steps.observed: Cannot test - no plans exist due to VAL-PLAN-003 failure

assertions.issues: BLOCKED by VAL-PLAN-003: Cannot test loading existing plans when no plans are persisted.

assertions.title: Dashboard lists all user plans

steps.action: Create multiple plans and navigate to /dashboard
steps.observed: Cannot test - no plans are persisted

assertions.issues: BLOCKED by VAL-PLAN-003: Cannot test plan listing when no plans are persisted.

assertions.title: Multiple plans per user

steps.action: Create Plan A and Plan B
steps.expected: Both plans coexist and appear on dashboard
steps.observed: Cannot test - no plans are persisted

assertions.issues: BLOCKED by VAL-PLAN-003: Cannot test multiple plans when persistence fails.

assertions.title: Plan edit persists on reload

steps.action: Modify existing plan via chat, reload page
steps.expected: Modified plan loads with changes preserved
steps.observed: Cannot test - no plan exists to edit

assertions.issues: BLOCKED by VAL-PLAN-003: Cannot test edit persistence when no plan exists.

assertions.title: First-visit journey end-to-end

steps.observed: Landing page loaded with Get Started CTA
Navigated to signup page

steps.action: Fill signup form with test credentials
steps.observed: Email and password fields populated
Successfully created account and redirected to /dashboard
Plan creation page loaded with chat interface

steps.action: Request plan: 'I'm at Santa Monica College transferring to UCLA for Computer Science'
steps.observed: AI successfully generated semester-by-semester plan
Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' - PLAN NOT SAVED

assertions.issues: Authentication and plan generation work correctly, but the plan persistence fails at the final step. The generated plan never appears on the dashboard because auto-save is not working.

assertions.title: Data persistence across sessions

steps.observed: Plan generated but not persisted
Signed out successfully, redirected to landing page

steps.action: Sign back in with same credentials
steps.observed: Successfully signed back in, authenticated state restored
Dashboard shows 'No plans yet' - no data persisted

assertions.issues: Authentication persistence works correctly (user can sign out and back in), but plan data persistence fails. The dashboard is empty after re-login because no plans were ever saved.

assertions.title: Multiple plans management

steps.action: Create Plan A with one set of inputs
steps.observed: Cannot test - persistence fails

steps.action: Create Plan B with different inputs
steps.expected: Plan B saved, both appear on dashboard
steps.observed: Cannot test - persistence fails

steps.expected: Each plan loads independently with correct data
steps.observed: Cannot test - no plans exist

assertions.issues: BLOCKED by VAL-PLAN-003: Cannot test multiple plan management when no plans are persisted.

frictions.description: Plan generation takes 45-60 seconds due to OpenRouter rate limits. Had to add explicit wait times.
frictions.resolution: Added sleep 45 and sleep 60 commands to wait for AI streaming to complete

frictions.description: Network request capture via agent-browser showed 'No requests captured' - the tool may not capture internal fetch/XHR calls from the page
frictions.resolution: Could not capture plan persistence API calls - may need different monitoring approach

frictions.description: After plan generation, a 'Dismiss' button/toast appears that needs to be dismissed before navigating
frictions.resolution: Added click on Dismiss button before navigating to dashboard

blockers.description: CRITICAL: Plan auto-save to Supabase is not working. AI generates plans successfully but they never persist to the database. This blocks all plan persistence-related assertions.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Generated plans twice, waited 60+ seconds each time, checked console for errors (none), navigated to dashboard - plans never appeared.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 0 passed, 2 failed (VAL-PLAN-003, VAL-CROSS-001), 1 partial (VAL-CROSS-005 - auth works but data doesn't persist), 5 blocked by critical plan persistence failure. The fix-plan-auto-save feature that was recently completed is NOT working - plans are generated by AI but never saved to Supabase. This is a critical regression that prevents all plan persistence functionality from working.
